mapper.insert:
select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docNo from esg.tb_emergency_control_task_asgmt where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and comp_id = #{compId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_emergency_control_task_asgmt ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, chart_id, comp_id, title, write_dt, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{chartId}, #{compId}, #{title}, #{writeDt}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_emergency_control_task_asgmt_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, role_id, role_nm, created_at, created_by, comp_id, task ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{roleId}, #{roleNm}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{compId}, #{task} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_emergency_control_task_asgmt_detail_hr ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, role_id, hr_id, created_at, created_by, comp_id ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{roleId}, #{hrId}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{compId} )
